base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of object_enemies_hazards — a character (minion) from 1990 super mario world. Thwomp + Spike Trap + Rope-swinging bar + other level-hazards. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Thwomp + Spike Trap + Rope-swinging bar + other level-hazards
